falsification_conditions.condition: The price surges above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear upward breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market participation, refuting the HOLD and suggesting a decisive price move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score drops below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decrease in blowoff score would indicate reduced volatility/momentum, directly contradicting the current pattern's similarity to a bottom formation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
